chunks.text: I.# ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. D- 612 of 201'6 ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE DATE o Hearin of Case For Hearing of Main Case 30.11.2017 Mr. Rafique Ahmed K. Abro, Advocate for the petitioner' Mr. Abid Hussain Qadri, State counsel. The counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition by directing the official respondents to act sEictly in accordance with law and not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. Order accordingly. The petition stands disposed of Ju ge I,raN\ I Abd H Qaz,/'"
